keyDecisions.title: In-memory repository pattern for demo app
keyDecisions.summary: Use in-memory arrays with repository pattern (findAll, findById, create, update, delete) for both Todo and Category domains. Seed data is included for immediate demo experience.

keyDecisions.title: Island hydration for interactive components
keyDecisions.summary: Use Mandu.island() pattern with data-island attributes for TodoList and CategoryManager. SSR provides initial HTML with data-props; islands hydrate on visibility for interactivity.

keyDecisions.title: Zod contracts for all API routes
keyDecisions.summary: Define Zod contracts for all 4 API routes (api-todos, api-todos-$id, api-categories, api-categories-$id). Shared schemas (TodoSchema, CategorySchema, PrioritySchema) defined per contract file.

keyDecisions.title: Note domain with Todo linkage
keyDecisions.summary: Create standalone Note domain (types, repository, service) with optional todoId foreign key. Pin feature for prioritizing important notes. Separate API routes and island component (NoteEditor).

keyDecisions.title: Global search via aggregated service layer
keyDecisions.summary: Create thin search.service.ts that delegates to existing todoService, noteService, categoryService. Single /api/search?q= endpoint returns grouped results. Client-side debounced input (300ms) for real
